---
description: "Design a new application architecture grounded in Contoso standards with industry best practices comparison from Microsoft Learn."
agent: "architect"
argument-hint: "Describe the application requirements: purpose, users, data sensitivity, scale, availability needs, and integration points."
---
Design a new application architecture for Contoso based on the requirements provided.

Follow Contoso company standards from the `standards/` folder and compare with Microsoft Learn best practices using the msdocs-mcp-server.

Produce a complete architecture document including:
- Architecture overview with component descriptions
- Detailed design for compute, data, networking, security, identity, observability, resiliency, and CI/CD
- Standards traceability table mapping decisions to Contoso standards
- Industry best practices comparison with MS Learn URLs
- Risks and open items

If requirements are incomplete, ask clarifying questions before proceeding.
